title: lastrea formosa
intro: Lastrea formosa, also known as the Himalayan maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan and Southeast Asian regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea formosa are believed to include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Lastrea formosa often include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
